content.problemStatement: Given an alphanumeric string made up of digits and lower case Latin characters only, find the sum of all the digit characters in the string.
constraints: **1** ≤ **|S|** ≤ **1000**, where |S| is the length of the string S.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains an integer **T** denoting the number of test cases. Then **T** test cases follow.
    Each test case is described with a single line containing a string **S**, the alphanumeric string.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single line containing the sum of all the digit characters in that string.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The digits in this string are 1, 2, 3 and 1. Hence, the sum of all of them is 7.
